expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured to resolve space ID from requests
expectations.evidence: No SpaceIdProvider interface used - manual X-Space-Id header instead

expectations.text: Separate token storage per tenant/space is implemented
expectations.evidence: tokenStorages Map stores separate TokenData per spaceId

expectations.text: CoSec-Space-Id header is properly set on requests
expectations.evidence: Uses custom X-Space-Id header instead of CoSec-Space-Id header

expectations.text: Multi-tenant fetcher registry or factory pattern is used
expectations.evidence: SpaceAwareFetcherFactory creates and caches separate Fetcher per space
setToken/clearToken functions manage tokens per space

claims.evidence: Map-based storage manages separate tokens per space

workarounds: Manual X-Space-Id header instead of CoSec-Space-Id

suggestions.reason: Should use CoSec framework's SpaceIdProvider instead of manual header

eval_feedback.overall: Basic multi-space support but not using CoSec framework properly
